case.title: LEHIGH VALLEY R. CO. v. ROYAL INDEMNITY CO.

opinion.h: LEHIGH VALLEY R. CO. v. ROYAL INDEMNITY CO. , 253 U.S. 483 (1920)
LEHIGH VALLEY RAILROAD COMPANY, petitioner, v. ROYAL INDEMNITY COMPANY and others.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. Lindley M. Garrison, Edgar H. Boles, and Richard W. Barrett, all of New York City, and Geo. S. Hobart, of Jersey City, N. J., for petitioner.
Petition for writs of certiorari to the Court of Errors and Appeals of the State
